chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 302 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «فَإِنْ لَمْ تَحْتَجْ فَأَمِرَّ عَلَيْهَا اَلسِّكِّينَ أَوِ اَلْمِقْرَاضَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.302 - In another report, it is stated:
"If you do not need to trim them (your nails), then pass a knife or scissors over them."
